task_completion.description: Open the budget_circular.ods file in LibreOffice Calc
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Calc is open and the window title or content clearly shows budget_circular.ods.
The spreadsheet cells no longer display circular reference error codes (like Err:522) and instead show standard numerical values.

task_completion.description: Ensure Overhead is calculated correctly based on direct expenses
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Overhead cell (B8) displays the value $4,500.00.

task_completion.description: Ensure Total Expenses are calculated correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Total Expenses cell displays the value $34,500.00.

task_completion.description: Ensure Net Income is calculated correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Net Income / Grand Total cell (B14) displays the value $40,500.00.
The user saves the document, indicated by clicking the save icon, using a keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+S), or the absence of the unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk in the title bar).

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Calc GUI to modify the spreadsheet
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the LibreOffice Calc interface rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of python scripts or command-line tools being used to directly modify the .ods file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct values after fixing the circular reference are: Overhead = $4,500.00 (15% of Salaries + Supplies), Total Expenses = $34,500.00, and Net Income / Grand Total = $40,500.00 (Revenue minus Total Expenses). The README contains a documented error claiming the Grand Total should be $45,750, which is incorrect and should be ignored.
